_readme: What the tap-to-hear button SPEAKS, when the bare 漢字 would be read wrong.
Speech synthesis reads the CHARACTER and picks the reading itself — our zhuyin/pinyin
never reaches the voice. So a polyphone given no context is a guess, and bound particles
(的/了/著) never stand alone in speech at all, so the voice falls back to their standalone
reading: 著 comes out zhù instead of zhe.
The only lever is context. Each 'say' below is the shortest natural phrase that forces the
reading this entry actually means. Keyed by word num.
NOT fixable this way: 和 (and). A Taiwan voice reads it hàn, which is a genuine Taiwanese
reading — no context forces hé, because hàn IS the conjunction reading it knows.

18.why: 的 alone -> dì; needs a possessive phrase to be read de

19.why: 了 alone -> liǎo; needs a completed action to be read le

20.why: 過 alone -> guò; needs the experiential use to be read guo

21.why: 著 alone -> zhù (reported); needs the continuous use to be read zhe

129.why: 教 alone may be read jiào (education); here it means to teach = jiāo

727.why: 吐 alone may be read tǔ (spit); here it means vomit = tù
